title: microseris laciniata subsp. laciniata
intro: Microseris laciniata subsp. laciniata, also known as the laciniated false dandelion, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which contain a variety of bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Microseris laciniata subsp. laciniata include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antioxidant, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate various health issues.
